name: &GAlignment Room&n
description:
Type alignment <number> to change your alignment.

The number means:
0:Lawful Good.
1:Neutral Good.
2:Chaotic Good.
3:Lawful Neutral.
4:True Neutral.
5:Chaotic Neutral.
6:Lawful Evil.
7:Neutral Evil.
8:Chaotic Evil.


AVISO: pLAYERS REMORTERS PERDERAM PONTOS DE
ATRIBUTOS AO MUDAR DE ALINHAMENTO.
